kill_fact: The catalyst is REAL and STILL LIVE (not fired, not slipped): the Feb 24, 2026 LS&H sale process is confirmed in the company's own 8-K with Morgan Stanley as advisor and explicit 'there can be no assurances that the sale process will result in a transaction' language, and as of June 2026 NO signed SPA / buyer / price exists (Q1 2026 8-K, Apr 29 2026: process 'underway, due diligence progressing, no guarantee of an agreement'). So the spread is NOT closed and the asymmetry survives, BUT it remains exactly what the bear says: UNDATED, NON-BINDING, SINGLE-BINARY self-help, with a leverage-SOFT (not cash/contract-backed) floor. It earns WATCHLIST/staging conviction, NOT dated-arb conviction.
corrections: (1) The bear's central floor-breaking premise is STALE/REVERSED: bear claims 'organic revenue still declining (Q4 2025 widening organic drop),' but Q1 2026 organic revenue was +0.6% (POSITIVE), recurring-organic FY guide +0.75% to +2.25%, net loss narrowed, 2026 outlook reaffirmed — the erosion-into-the-floor mechanism is trending the OTHER way. (2) LEVERAGE overstated/improving, not worsening: Q1 2026 total debt $4,326.8M (not ~$4.5B), net debt ~$4.08B, net leverage ~4.0x (not 4.5x), $143M of debt retired at a discount in Q1, EBITDA margin +~200bps; deleveraging is happening BEFORE any sale. (3) SHARE COUNT: bull SoP used ~720M; the AGM 8-K shows 642.2M ordinary shares (record date Mar 16, 2026), ~11% lower, so per-share equity in every SoP scenario is modestly HIGHER than modeled. (4) FCF: 2025 actual FCF $365.3M (the ~$400M figure is the 2026E midpoint, not actuals). (5) 'ACTIVIST' label confirmed FALSE: May 14, 2026 AGM cleanly re-elected all 10 directors, no dissident slate — company-run, not activist-forced; maturity wall is 2028/2029 notes being actively amortized via FCF, softer than 'wall' framing.
evidence: Clarivate FY2025 8-K / earnings release (filed Feb 24, 2026), SEC EDGAR accession 000176404626000018: announces active LS&H sale process, Morgan Stanley advisor, 'there can be no assurances that the sale process will result in a transaction'; total debt $4,469.9M, cash $329.2M, 2025 Adj EBITDA $1,001.8M, 2025 FCF $365.3M; LS&H 2025 revenue $389.8M (-6.9% YoY).

Clarivate Q1 2026 8-K / earnings release (SEC EDGAR accession 000176404626000057, filed Apr 29, 2026): LS&H 'process underway, due diligence progressing, no guarantee of an agreement,' no buyer/timeline; Q1 organic revenue +0.6%; total debt $4,326.8M, cash $242.2M, net debt ~$4.08B, net leverage ~4.0x; $143M debt repaid at a discount; net loss narrowed to $40.2M, Adj EBITDA $241.2M (~41% margin), FCF $78.9M; 2026 outlook reaffirmed.

Clarivate 8-K reporting 2026 AGM results, SEC EDGAR clvt-20260514 (meeting held May 14, 2026): 642,179,542 ordinary shares outstanding as of record date Mar 16, 2026; all 10 directors re-elected, no dissident slate — confirms NO activist forcing function.
Live price check (late June 2026): CLVT ~$1.93-$2.13, consensus Hold, mean target $3.64 — spread to SoP has NOT closed; no signed-deal re-rate has occurred. (stockanalysis.com/stocks/clvt/)
